title: carex × mastnyana
intro: Carex × mastnyana is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Carex aquatilis and Carex lasiocarpa, commonly known as a sedge. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex × mastnyana include its potential to reduce swelling and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
